blockingIssues.description: `SupplyAllocation` now renders source-note text visibly, but LP / Liquidity, Programmatic Funding, and Airdrop / Migration still link to generic token/search pages rather than direct row-specific basescan addresses or stable Dune query targets, so users still cannot click straight from those rows to the exact on-chain basis for the displayed figures.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/economics.md` to describe the first-vault `$25,000` policy as a total vault cap across all users and to remove stale per-wallet wording from the bidding-model guidance.
Updated `.factory/library/use-case-analysis.md` so the social-vault timeline no longer describes the first-vault policy as a per-wallet deposit cap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` contingent on transcript-visible proof of required pre-work (such as mandated design-system/screenshot reads) and required test-first sequencing; if either is skipped, workers should record a deviation instead of reporting full compliance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun reviews for `correction-hero-graph-first-ordering-fix` and `correction-proof-module-lazy-loading-client-boundary-fix` both found `followedProcedure=true` handoffs even though the transcript skeletons lacked required pre-read evidence and, in the proof fix, showed implementation edits landing before the first test edit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove lingering `per-wallet` phrasing from the mission AGENTS, validation contract, and content-strategy skill so shared guidance matches the corrected first-vault policy without preserving the superseded term even in negated form.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `correction-vault-calculator-sqrt-model-and-per-wallet-purge` found shared-state drift across `/Users/test/.factory/missions/33dae310-26cf-4368-9488-64b235b6db83/AGENTS.md`, `validation-contract.md`, and `.factory/skills/content-strategy-worker/SKILL.md`; the repo library files were corrected in this scrutiny pass, but the mission/skill sources still carry stale wording future workers can copy.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require transcript-visible reads of the relevant `.factory/library/*.md` inputs before a worker can report `followedProcedure=true`, or else require the handoff to mark the skipped library review as a deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `correction-on-chain-citations-visible-links-fix` found a `followedProcedure=true` handoff even though the transcript skeleton showed no `.factory/library/` reads despite the skill explicitly requiring those reads before edits.
